reviews.review_text: We only popped in for a look. Looks  very well maintained. Cafe is really cute
We just happened upon Conway Beach tourist park.  We were pleasantly surprised, it was a beautiful quiet park. Well designed, set out, well kept and close to the beach. Definitely worth the drive.
A great park for families and couples.  Our grandchildren loved the train and the water park which was outside the pool fence so they could go any time and play in it. Pizza night saved cooking.

We booked 2 nights ensuite camping site during Xmas day, willing getting some outdoor activities with young children there may is the place to go,walk about 100m from the site to beach ⛱️ and 500m from the shore to reach the water, good for flying kite 🪁but not swim.  Can't work out their WiFi even the site have given you password. Phone works fine. Aside from the mosquitoes, campgrounds with private bathrooms are good value for money.  this Christmas. We leaves earlier coz the mosquito so horrible I mean it.

I’d suggest being very clear about check-in arrangements before booking. If you don’t arrive by 2pm, there is no contact from the park to explain late check-in procedures. I attempted to call multiple times after 5pm and left several messages and emails, but received no response.
Because I couldn’t confirm how to access the room after hours, I didn’t drive out — only to be told the following day that a key had been left out for me. Unfortunately, this meant I paid for accommodation I was unable to use, and no refund was offered.
The park itself appears tidy and well maintained, however the lack of communication around after-hours check-in and the handling of the situation has left me disappointed. I wouldn’t choose to stay again.

Leuke camping.  Wel een eind door het mooie landschap rijden. Toen wij er waren was het rustig.

Alles was opgeruimd en netjes.

Alleen de camping is daar. Met vele dingen voor kinderen.
Maar verder ook niets.

Do not stay here! It is run by dishonest thieves. My daughter and I booked and paid in advance for accomodation here. Due to circumstances beyond our control, we had to cancel our bookings. We gave them 55 days notice. Their website says they require 45 days notice. After numerous emails were ignored, we made numerous phone calls. They actually lied to us telling us they refunded the money. This went on for a fortnight. We received no refunds. Eventually, we made formal complaints to The Department of Fair Trading and I finally got a refund about a month later. My daughter is still waiting for her $600. If she doesn't receive it, the next step is the Small Claims Tribunal. Absolute grubs.
The place has improved a lot since I was here 7 years ago
Burgers at George's are phenomenal. Highly recommended
A return visit for us. We love this park, from the perfect setting, the 50’s diner onsite, the location - easy stroll to the beach. Everything is perfect! Staff are always friendly & welcoming.
This was a beautiful, clean and peaceful camp ground. The staff were so friendly and amazing, would recommend!

Found this site last minute for accommodation. We were camping so only needed two sites. Paid my deposit to lock it in. Ended up paying $720 for 2 powered camp sites for 3 nights. We paid for one site for two people $75 + $15 additional 4 adults. The other site was 2 adults & 2 children so $105 per night. Extremely expensive for camping sites. If the camp sites were paid per site it would be the perfect spot. I would definitely check your cost as a whole.

This caravan park is great for anyone, especially families with kinds. It has all the amenities needed. Pool, waterpark, jumping pillow, playground and twice daily train rides for the kids or kids at heart. Quick walk to beach.
Didn't stay just visited the diner for lunch....so clean and well presented.  Food is excellent value....make sure you have a banana split!!
Great relaxing caravan park 👌

Wir hatten Stellplatz Nr. 57 und es war der schlechteste Aufenthalt unserer 2 Jahre Australienreise. Bis 1 Uhr nachts sehr laut durch Reden und Lachen, an Schlaf war nicht zu denken. Zusätzlich starker Fäkalgeruch, dadurch konnten wir nicht einmal frühstücken und sind frühzeitig abgereist. Absolut nicht empfehlenswert.
Great place to stay, very friendly staff and clean amenities.
Nice park
Graey quiet and friendly spot.

This park is 30 minutes out from Airlee Beach, but don’t be put off by that. It isn’t a bad drive into the CBD from the park. ||While the amenities in the park are a little older, they are clean and well presented.  Nice hot water. ||A little hidden gem is their American style diner.  Good food and reasonably priced. Reflective of this is how busy it gets.  But, there is plenty of seating so no stress about getting a table. ||Grassed areas are well kept and the sites are nicely separated with light plantings of palms. ||We have a 27 (all up) foot van and easy reversibility in to the site. ||The beach is great for walks. ||The pool area and children’s play area are well located and we were there over school holidays with very minimal impact.  Well thought out. ||Only thing, and please, this is just me. I feel the park needs to be stricter on smoking. We had two vans behind and one opposite with smokers and it did impact on us sitting outside. ||But overall. Great stay.

This is a little out of the way from the main centre of Airlee Beach.  However the drive isn’t a disappointment.

They have a diner set on the old American style decor and it is pretty busy.  A reflection on the good food, reasonable prices and great location.

While the park amenities are older, they are clean and nice hot showers.

Pretty easy parking up the caravan too.

It’s nice that light palms seperate sites snd the children’s play area and water park don’t impede on caravan sites with noise.

We enjoyed our 3 nights very much.
Beautiful little caravan park, not far from the beach.  Great place to unwind, staff were very welcoming and the sites were quite spacious....will be back.
Great cafe in old 50s decor. Love this place.
Lovely place, very quite and peaceful

After turning up had to leave due to No phone or internet 🛜 issues no phone or service need as my sons type 1 and needed to monitor
Informed management was very unstandardised at 1st told us we would return a full refund!!!
After having to stay up the road and 4 emails and number of calls 5 days later returned my money missing one day and 100dollours credit I had
And an upset phone call from the manager was not called for as in telling me I was a liar and he could’ve booked his cabin out
U can stay here if u like no phone or interview also be told when to eat a the pizza shop also good to be on Acid as the hole park is on with some kind of wiggles theme
Every is in colour and painted bright even toilets have pink pox
Anyway issues was phone

We stayed for 1 night, but boy did we make the most of it and we will be back. We had the parks yummy Saturday night pizza, and dined at the diner for lunch. We loved riding in the little train. The pool was beautiful. The wildlife was breath taking. Really grateful that the lovely gentleman, whose name starts with L, looked after us. He went above and beyond for us during our stay. We couldn't have asked for more. Thankyou so much.

Love Big 4 Conway! Park is clean and well looked after. Pool and jumping pillow are lots of find for kids. Milkshakes from the diner were a huge hit with the kids. We loved renting the go carts and cruising around the park. If you like fishing then there’s lots of options!

We loved our stay. Lovely clean and tidy park. Awesome lunch and service at the Diner. Friendly check in staff and the grand kids couldn't get enough of the pool, waterpark and train. We will be back.

Awesome spot, stopped in for the night. Staff are great. The diner is very cool to see. Alot of effort has gone into the park and is clean and tidy.Great for kids with he pool and splash park.

Very good spot to stop in to see.

We just stayed for our daughter’s first birthday the staff were so accommodating! It was a wet weekend but the gentleman brought the train out on her birthday when there was a break in the rain. Will definitely be back! Thank you so much for having us we had the best time ❤️

We didn't stay here but we pulled into Conway Beach for dinner in the caravan, and the lovely owner of the Big 4 approached us to ask if we were looking for a place to stay. The reception was closed but he offered to open up for us if we needed! He was so lovely!

We only pulled in to Conway for dinner but every one we drove past waved to us and made us feel so welcome!

Such a quiet little community!

The owner of the Caravan Park was one of the friendliest people we have met on our endeavors! There's a pool and jumping pillow etc to accommodate the kids!

Definitely a hidden gem!

If you're heading past Conway Beach, consider staying here and supporting a lovely little community 😊

We absolutely loved our stay! Friendly service and clean amenities.
Awesome pool, but could of had some more shade.

We went to The Rock& Roll cafe
Food was good
Not sure about accommodation we went for breakfast absolutely beautiful & our pup was welcome as well

We just left  conway beach van Park big 4 never been so disappointed in over 60 years travelling, turned up booked in told them the price on the net was $98 for 3 notes she says no its $147 for 3 so proceed to show her can't we only have optus so I can't prove then she didn't want to deal with me so get hubby ok we pay go to site.all good except every building is painted a different colour (doing my head in. Esp in the toilet 3/ 4 different colours ) ok all good that nite people all around us are partying  manager comer & quietens them down next nite worse no manager ,wife gets up gives a serve waste of time I go at 2 am tell them to get to bed I am calling the cops wow scattered whatever they were smoking was obviously illegal. So we had had enough asked for a refund sorry agai st policy ,but you weren't policing yor tennents nope.LAST TIME WE GO THERE & WILL NOT BE PAYING ANYMORE THAN 1 DAY AT A TIME.

Went with a group today. Amazing service from very friendly staff. Also wet for a walk around the grounds. What amazing Caravan park.immaculate grounds,very tidy and clen. Love the carqvan spots that have there own bathroom too cute. Also absolutely loved the beautiful bright coulors of all the cabins and buildings. Quiet spot tucked away in a nice nook. Has everything you need for a get away.
Thankyou very much ladies,we all had a lovely day and good laughs . The old signage and cheeky coffee mugs. Will definately be going there for a quick getaway thats away from town area. Stunning Beach.
Again thankyou vey much for your hospitality.🙋👍👍👍👍👍👍👍🤓
After one year and half traveling all around Australia I think the most beautiful, well maintained and cutest camping we have done so far. Super smiley and friendly team! ❤️

I stayed at an ensuite site.  The ensuite was clean and spacious.  The site was roomy enough to spread out a little.  Grounds kept beautifully.  The pool was sensational, service incredible, and the diner served yummy food! No complaints here.  Loved the bright colours around the camp too.  Great camp kitchen and ammenities.  Loved it!
Well maintained little park which is very kid-friendly. In hindsight, an ensuite cabin would have been preferable as it was a long walk to the toilets. Cannot fault staff or service. Lovely people.

So I went to Conway Beach on my vacation. And It is definitely so good had lots of fun and I love fun had very yummy pizza on Saturday night, go to  the pool, seeing my sons bounce is so fun😂but I was  sad when we have to leave, definitely coming back here someday
Beautiful place
Nice quiet park with good swimming pool. The beach is good for a walk not swimming and people were fishing.
Great place to stay, have lunch at the rockabilly Cafe and check out the colourful cabin accommodation if you don't have a van.
Nice spot
Very clean and tidy park, will recommend to other travellers
Insanely great 50s style....
Recently stayed here on a fishing trip. The fisherman’s cabins are perfect! Just what you need after a day on the water. Very clean and well maintained. I will hopefully be back soon.
We visited this location to show our Kiwi friends Georges Diner & have lunch there. Service was great, Food was lovely & we were amazed at how quickly we received our lunch, thank you.

We stayed at this wonderful park for 3 nights on a powered site. Leanne and Chris were so welcoming and both had a great sense of humour. This park is so beautifully maintained in every sense from lawn mowing, amenities, rubbish bins (spotless), not to mention the lovely 50’s diner where the food is fantastic. Just a short stroll down to the ocean and you can walk for ages along the beach overlooking the Whitsundays… we’ll be back!
Beautiful location and great facilities. We loved the 1950’s diner - so much character; great food and reasonable prices. Definitely coming back :)
We had a great stay at this lovely park.  So clean and big sites.  They Managers are lovely including their dog Sunday 💗. Highly recommended 😊😊

The service was excellent from the lady who took our order.  One of us was genuinely lactose intolerant so she ensured the food they had didn’t have any.  The food came out quickly, was piping hot and delicious.  Great location if you have kids, as it’s close to the beach, great play park nearby.  Well worth the visit!

The most stylish and cleanest  caravan park I have come across so far in my travels, the managers are amazing and super friendly. I loved loved staying here. Amazing fishing frim the beach which is only 150 meters walk. Quiet  peaceful and not over populated.
Awesome job by all staff and I couldn't really find fault with the facilities. Oh forget to mention the cleanest bbqs I've ever seen.

Amazing place caravan Park so clean and the toilets best looking toilets I have ever seen in my travels so colourful Amazing staff so friendly great team we will be back thanks for a amazing time at Park great pool
Water park is now a splash park, no water slides, new pool, no water slides. Train rides every day, nice tidy park. Great kiosk, walking distance to the beach.
This place is great stay with kids and for the fisherman with prossie boat ramp only a short drive

Great little Cafe.
Drop in for a burger and a milk shake.

NEVER COMING BACK- booked a week here for just after xmas and intended on making the 13 hour drive with our small children and caravan to stay. 7 hours into our trip i called to let them know our son who has special needs was struggling with the drive and we may not make it on the check in day. To which i was told we had no booking someone 'apparently' tried to contact us to make the 'final' payment but couldn't get onto me (no missed calls or emails and still had an active booking in our big4 login) so they cancelled our booking nearly a month prior without us even knowing! The owner then decided he also wouldn't refund our deposit despite having taken another booking in our place and the manager on the day saying she would organise the refund. Absolutely disgusting management practises!
Very quiet park near Airlie

I can't give a star for the rooms as I stayed on a powered Ensuite site and give it a 4 star, and it was EXCELLENT.
Conway beach Big4 is a place where you will find a fabulous shop, where you can have a nice meal and a few drinks if you like as well.
The retro feel is pretty extraordinary and done very well.
The facilities (toilets, showers, and laundry)are in great working, clean, and tidy order, this they should be very proud of it. The grounds keeper is a man with very MANY talents with the number of job roles he has in keeping the park running smoothly, (the train driver to be precise) he needs a pay rise WITHOUT a QUESTION.
The train was the highlight for my child and went on it not once, but twice a day every day in the time that we were there.
The downside is that when camping it in wet season, there is no reprieve from the heat and humidity, even in the pool. The water is so hot that it doesn't cool you down at all it makes you feel worse, It's quite uncomfortable. However, go have a cold shower and repeat as often as need be, That's a real honest win. The pool water evaporated, It was that hot and had to be refilled at least once in the few days that we were there. The water spout park, the water there was the only way you could cool yourself somewhat beside the cold showers which trumps it all and it was at least 10 degrees cooler than the (hot bath water) pool.
With in saying the above the only suggestive comment about the whole place, is that maybe a few shade sails over the pool wouldn't hurt to give patrons/customers shade and some reprieve from the scorching sun, heat, and humidity this time of yeah.
As for location GREAT FOR THE KEEN FISHER PERSON as that is what the park is aimed at, it's not a place to go stay in hope you can just go down the road to local supermarket, it a place you need to be prepared for days at a time, as mentioned above it targets the fishing adventurers and not the typical family relaxing holiday unless you like isolation heat and humidity.....and fishing. It can get very windy (depending on storms etc) quickly being so close to the sand flats and some coolness to your camp when there is no breeze it's hard to keep comfortable during the days when the heat is up, and you don't have a cabin with air/con.
All in all, it's a functional place to stay with the amenities they have for you to get by,  for as long as one needs.
Will recommend it to My FISHER friends.

Great little cabins
Wonderful amenities
Amazing diner
Amazing stay despite the weather - the staff couldn’t have been more friendly and helpful. The diner is amazing!

Went for American Diner lunch. Good atmosphere.
Great burgers and shakes.
1950s vibe
Not far to Conway Beach and 20 mins from Proserpine, and then back on Shute Harbour Road to Airlie Beach.
I just dropped into the George's Dinner for a milk shake. Normally love their burgers.

We haven't been staying at the tourist park but just accidentally came across this fantastic cafe / restaurant and were impressed with the service, quality of burgers and amazing decorations. It's the last thing that you would expect to see in this small town with the beautiful beach. I wish something like this existed in Brisbane.
Beautiful spot if u want to relax with kids, loved the pool and loved the toilets, they were so good

Second visit to this little slice of paradise. The sites are lush and green, very nice sized, and the BBQ and water play is great. There is a train ride for the kids and a retro American dinner for eating
A fantastic stay. Staff were extremely accommodating on arrival when there was a small issue with my room. They also allowed me both an early check in and slightly delayed check out. 5 star for sure!
Lovely caravan park.

Good clean caravan park. Very good for families with a water park swimming pool jumping pillow and daily train ride for the children. When the weather permits good fishing. There is also a diner on site. Short walk to the beach. Lots of crocodiles in the area. 30 minute drive to Airlie Beach.
Great little park and very colourful place. Great retro diner

Had a great week camping at this park. Nice and peaceful with clean and tidy amenities. Fishing was great and the lovely couple working at the park were very friendly and accommodating. Would definitely recommend as a nice getaway!
Fantastic place to stay.
great spot for kids
Excellent all round

We didn't mind the park and no problems with staff,but was shocked that our site was right beside the septic tank at head height.Particularly as there had been other reviews stating that the vent pipe needed extending,which was a cheap job.The site smelled worse than parking near a public toilet and the people across from us were complaining they could smell it too.This is not acceptable in a tourist park and was glad we were only there one night.

Fantastic caravan park,  very clean and well maintained.  We really enjoyed how peaceful it was and it even has a retro diner attached.   The owners / managers go to alot of effort putting on fin nights like bingo etc.

We were booked to go camping but 3 days prior my children got Hand, Foot and Mouth and so I was doing my part in stopping the spread and cancelled my booking. I can appreciate the importance of a cancellation policy, but the lack of public relations is unfortunate. 5 days later, my children had no symptoms and we phoned to see if we could use our deposit and still come up, which was still in the time frame of our original booking. We were told we couldn’t unless we stayed for 2 nights, but we weren’t able to have the same site for both nights which unfortunately wasn’t worth the hassle of packing down our caravan set up. Our site was booked by another person for the 2 nights we were unable to attend our booking and we were hoping to stay for our 3rd night of the booking, meaning the owner was not out of pocket with a lack of booking. I understand cancellation policies, but I am disappointed in the service and interactions around this. We won’t be booking here again.
Really great little park with 50/60s style milkbar and diner. Close to beach.

Top little neat and tidy park. Very clean amenities and grounds.  Staff going over and beyond to cater to your needs, especially when it is State of Origin night.   Unique style of cabins.  Close to the beach.  Perfect for couples or families.   A must to visit!

Beautiful and colourful park , spotless grounds ammenties are spotless as well , well maintained and management are freindy and easy to deal with .
We stayed 10 days great sites 👍
Swimming pool was amazing and water park .
Perfect for kids and family's
They had a music day a chap was playing the guitar 🎸 and signing sounded awesome.
Have a walk along the beach or relax at your site .
Have a train rides for kids around the park .
Highly recommended 10/10 for us 👌

Took the kids to Big 4 Conway Beach to get away from the crazy city life and give our kids a bit of a getaway. The rooms were great, the kids had a great time in the water park, riding the bikes, riding the train, and enjoying the scenery around them.
Although the facilities were great, the hospitality/kitchen side of things could be improved. Being the first ones at the diner waiting for it to open for breakfast, to being the last ones in the diner and then being served our meal was disappointing to say the least. (We were the only ones in the park with small children) Being told by the kitchen hand that they’re not sure how to serve a simple dish such as pancakes, kind of blew me away a bit. While waiting for our meals the intermittent music made the atmosphere of the diner more irritating than enjoyable… and forgetting cutlery…. not sure if we will be returning to this one again.
